'''Abraxin''' was a swampy [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]]. It was an exporter of [[Abrax/Legends|Abrax cognac]].

==History==
A member state of [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]] during the [[Pre-Republic era]], Abraxin later joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] with the destruction of the empire.

At some point, a group of [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] made their way to the world and created a small settlement.

During the lifetime of [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]], Abraxin was aligned with [[Skere Kaan|Lord Kaan's]] [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] and was strong in the dark side. However, this power had waned signficantly by the time of [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Darth Plagueis]].<ref name="Darth Plagueis novel">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>

Circa [[67 BBY/Legends|67 BBY]], the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Naat Lare]], visited Abraxin in order to hunt [[marsh haunt]]s, as an aspect of his [[Sith training|training]]. As an escapee from the [[Bedlam Institution for the Criminally Demented]], Lare was separately hunted by both [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Darth Plagueis]] and by two Jedi, [[Ni-Cada]] and [[Lo Bukk]].

During the final days of the Republic, the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Exploration Corps/Legends|Exploration Corps]] dispatched the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ur-Sema Du]] and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Kai Justiss]] on a [[mission to Abraxin]], where the duo encountered and captured a marsh haunt for study by the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]]. With the rise of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Abraxin seceded from the Republic.
